### Site Configuration

Update `docusaurus.config.ts`:

```typescript
const config: Config = {
  title: 'Your Docs Site',
  tagline: 'Your tagline here',
  url: 'https://your-site.com',
  organizationName: 'your-org',
  projectName: 'your-docs'
  // ... other settings
};
```
